title: CatalogService
description: One catalog-as-code service definition (blueprint doc 14). A service targets EITHER component abstract types (abstractTypes) OR a group kind (groupKind). Its `properties` JSON-Schema fragment drives pass-2 validation, the property form, IaC, and cost.

key.description: Catalog key, e.g. aws.rds. Referenced by component.binding.service.

icon.description: Path into the icon set, e.g. aws/database/rds.svg

abstractTypes.description: Component taxonomy paths this service can bind to (doc 05). Mutually exclusive with groupKind.

groupKind.description: For services that materialize as a CAML group (e.g. aws.vpc -> network). Mutually exclusive with abstractTypes.

capabilities.description: Capability answers inherited from the abstract type (free-form for now).

properties.description: Map of property name -> JSON Schema fragment. The pass-2 validator builds an object schema from this.
